title: Snapp
summary: High-scale React/Next.js/TypeScript product — PWAs, UI kit, Redux Toolkit, SWR, and mobile-first delivery for millions of users in Tehran.

narrative.problem: A consumer super-app serving millions needed fast, reliable frontends across devices and network conditions.
narrative.challenge: Ship features at scale without sacrificing performance, accessibility, or maintainability across teams.
narrative.process: Built on a shared UI kit, Redux Toolkit for state, SWR for data — with CI/CD, ESLint, and mobile-first patterns.
narrative.solution: Production PWAs and responsive web apps with strong TypeScript boundaries and cross-browser quality.
narrative.outcome: Millions of users rely on the experience daily — performance and reliability are non-negotiable.

title: Jaan
summary: First production frontend role — React, Agile delivery, and shipping real features to real users.

narrative.problem: A growing product needed a dedicated frontend engineer to ship UI reliably.
narrative.challenge: Learn production patterns fast while delivering under Agile sprints.
narrative.process: React components, code review, JIRA workflows, and iterative releases.
narrative.solution: Shipped production features with attention to UX and cross-browser basics.
narrative.outcome: Built the foundation for everything that came after at Snapp.

title: ILIA Corporation
summary: First industry internship — learning how teams work, communicate, and deliver.

narrative.problem: I needed real workplace experience alongside university.
narrative.challenge: Translate classroom knowledge into professional collaboration.
narrative.process: Task management, written communication, and team workflows.
narrative.solution: Showed up, learned, and contributed where I could.
narrative.outcome: The first step from student to engineer.
